title: Fix Result v1
description: Output of the agentic fixer stage in the v2 review pipeline. Consumed by the read-only judge (aggregate.mjs) to determine which reviewer blockers were actually addressed. Addressed entries MUST be namespaced as `<role>/<id>` so two reviewers emitting the same bare blocker id cannot cross-clear each other (see #342 design review).

input_sha.description: SHA the fixer started from. MUST equal the reviewers' reviewed_sha. The judge fails closed on mismatch.

new_sha.description: SHA after the fixer pushed (or input_sha if the fixer was a no-op).

merge_resolution.description: Optional. Records the outcome of the pipeline's pre-fixer `git merge origin/main` attempt. Populated by the agent when MERGE_STATE=conflicts; absent or {merge_state: none|clean, ...} otherwise. Judge ignores this field; surfaced in finalize comments.
